message:
fix(ci): Add missing packages to bundle, skip numpy-only tests

- Add tenacity, requests, httpx, urllib3, xxhash, regex, msgpack to
  the site-packages bundle (fixes 4 cf-compat + 49 native ext tests)
- Skip numpy-dependent describe blocks in real-world.test.ts (9 tests
  that require the python-numpy.wasm variant, not available in CI)

files.patch:
@@ -89,7 +89,9 @@ jobs:
             jinja2 markupsafe click pyyaml beautifulsoup4 soupsieve \
             h11 attrs starlette packaging pyparsing six certifi idna \
             charset-normalizer anyio sniffio annotated-types \
-            typing-extensions jsonpatch jsonpointer distro tblib httpcore
+            typing-extensions jsonpatch jsonpointer distro tblib httpcore \
+            tenacity requests httpx urllib3 \
+            xxhash regex msgpack
 
       - name: Run tests
         run: npm test
